feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Machine learning researcher and engineer specializing in explainability, multimodal AI, and agentic systems. Associate Applied Machine Learning Specialist at the Vector Institute, Toronto.

entry.title: JAX: The Python Library That Makes PyTorch Engineers Feel Like They’re Learning to Code Again

link.title: JAX: The Python Library That Makes PyTorch Engineers Feel Like They’re Learning to Code Again

entry.summary: A deep dive into JAX — what makes it different from PyTorch, and why it feels like starting from scratch in the best possible way.

entry.title: PyTorch Lightning 101 — Are You Still Writing the Same PyTorch Boilerplate Every Single Project?

link.title: PyTorch Lightning 101 — Are You Still Writing the Same PyTorch Boilerplate Every Single Project?

entry.summary: How PyTorch Lightning eliminates repetitive training loop boilerplate and lets you focus on what actually matters — your model.
